agent_simplification_impact: Future Phase 1 closeout agents read one compact packet for constitution conformance instead of reconstructing P1-18 from v2.md and chat context.
token_budget_impact: One short JSON packet replaces repeated broad V2 section reads during closeout and keeps evidence pointers in a bounded structure.
bounded_context_plan: Use /srv/bears/AGENTS.md, /srv/bears/plugins/bears/AGENTS.md, v2.md P1-18 and section 14.20 status fields, /tmp/bears-p1-18-constitution-assignment.json, this packet, and the listed validator command outputs only.
future_reuse_path: Phase 1 status and closeout tooling can reuse docs/audits/capability-v2/constitution-change-check.json as the current constitution conformance packet for constitution_change_status.
operator_decision_boundary: Agents own route checks, bounded packet content, deterministic validator runs, and restricted-data exclusion. The operator owns any scope expansion, lifecycle reordering, or authorization outside the declared P1-18 audit packet.
cost_justification_if_any: The packet is a small closeout proof that prevents repeated manual constitution review and gives status tooling a stable input.
lifecycle_position: P1-18 runs after route and role evidence is present and before Phase 1 closeout reads constitution_change_status.
route_audit_evidence: python3 scripts/platform_roles.py route docs/audits/capability-v2/constitution-change-check.json -> status: matched; concrete_part: platform_role_governance; primary_role: bears-platform-role-governor; exit: 0

python3 scripts/platform_roles.py audit docs/audits/capability-v2/constitution-change-check.json -> status: matched; concrete_part: platform_role_governance; primary_role: bears-platform-role-governor; implementation_handoff_allowed: true; exit: 0

constitution_principle_coverage.agent_simplification: One closeout packet names the decision and evidence path.
constitution_principle_coverage.token_economy: Bounded evidence pointers replace repeated broad reads.
constitution_principle_coverage.bounded_context: The packet lists only the files and commands needed for closeout.
constitution_principle_coverage.future_reuse: Status tooling can read this file for constitution_change_status.
constitution_principle_coverage.deterministic_validation: python3 scripts/plugin_constitution.py inspect-change --packet docs/audits/capability-v2/constitution-change-check.json is the executable proof.
constitution_principle_coverage.operator_boundary: Agents verify the packet; the operator owns wider scope or lifecycle changes.

changed_v2_surface_evidence.trust_boundary: Governed audit packet only; no product, runtime, repository-boundary, secret, or external exposure change.
